title: "Children's Tribune" Project is Moving to the 2026 World Cup
description: Journalist Hakan Coşkun, who attracted international public attention with the Children's Tribune project launched at the 2022 Qatar World Cup, has begun preparations for the 2026 World Cup. The team, preparing to represent Turkey at the event to be held in the United States, Canada, and Mexico, is planning a broader media organization. The project, which started in Karabük, continues to emphasize that sport is not just about the score but also about culture and brotherhood.

title: Turkish Embassy in Qatar Official Statement
description: Ambassador Göksu received journalist Hakan Coşkun and Muhammed Ülker, the coordinators of the Children's Tribune project visiting Qatar within the scope of the FIFA 2022 World Cup, at his office. During the meeting, the ongoing work for the Children's Tribune project, planned to be implemented in many countries around the world, was discussed and best wishes for the project's success were extended.

title: End to Violence in the Stands: Global Giants Line Up for the Children's Tribune Project
description: The Children's Tribune project, which aims to transform the negative atmosphere in sports venues, has become the focus of global brands on the road to the 2026 World Cup. The project, preparing to represent Turkey at the event to be held in the United States, Canada, and Mexico, is attracting great interest in the international arena. While many global brands from the food, energy, retail, and technology sectors have applied to sponsor the project, project management is prioritizing collaborations aligned with its social responsibility vision.

title: Children's Tribune Project Reaches the World Cup in Qatar
description: The Children's Tribune project, led by Hakan Coşkun and carried out in partnership with SSAUMDER (Association for Combating Violence, Alcohol, and Drugs in Sports) and Kuzeybatı International Media, is preparing to continue its activities at the Qatar World Cup. The project aims to reduce violence in the stands and create a safer viewing environment for children. The initiative, which highlights the unifying power of sport, aims to raise social awareness at the international event.

title: "Children's Tribune" Project is Moving to the 2026 World Cup
description: Journalist Hakan Coşkun, who attracted international public attention with the Children's Tribune project launched at the 2022 Qatar World Cup, has begun preparations for the 2026 World Cup. The team, preparing to represent Turkey at the event to be held in the United States, Canada, and Mexico, is planning a more comprehensive media organization. While the project, which started in Karabük, emphasizes that sport is not just about the score but also culture and brotherhood, it aims to produce content on a global scale with a strong production and digital team. The project continues to attract strong interest from national and international sponsors.

title: Coşkun: "We Must Free Our Children from the Digital Prisons We Built with Our Own Hands"
description: While the recent violence incidents in schools in Turkey have caused public outrage, Hakan Coşkun, President of the Association for Combating Violence, Alcohol, and Drugs in Sports and Children's Tribune Project Leader, issued important warnings. Coşkun stated that the incidents are a consequence and emphasized that the real problem starts within the family. Drawing attention to digital addiction and social disconnection, Coşkun highlighted the importance of social projects and a conscious family approach for the healthy development of children.

title: Visit to Oktay Saral
description: The executives of the Association for Combating Violence, Alcohol, and Drugs in Sports (SSAUMDER) visited Presidential Chief Advisor Oktay Saral. During the visit, information was shared about the association's activities and social responsibility projects.

title: Massive Sponsorship Interest for the Children's Tribune Project for the World Cup
description: The Children's Tribune project, which aims to eliminate violence and negativity in the stands using the unifying power of sport, has faced intense interest from national and international brands while continuing its preparations for the 2026 FIFA World Cup. While the project aims to create a safer and more inclusive stands culture for children, it also seeks to strengthen the social responsibility dimension of sport on a global scale. The growing sponsorship interest indicates that the project will reach a wider sphere of influence in the international arena.

title: Massive Sponsorship Interest for the Children's Tribune Project for the World Cup
description: Sponsorship applications are increasing. The project is attracting intense interest from national and international brands. Having succeeded in drawing attention with its success at the 2022 FIFA World Cup, the project is preparing to represent Turkey at the 2026 FIFA World Cup to be hosted by the United States, Canada, and Mexico. It is stated that many global companies from the food, energy, retail, and technology sectors have submitted sponsorship applications. The project aims to create a safer stands environment for children by highlighting the unifying power of sport.

title: Major Sponsorship for the Children's Tribune Project for the World Cup
description: As the Children's Tribune project prepares for the 2026 World Cup, it has received intense sponsorship interest from national and global brands. While the project aims to create a safer stands environment for children using the unifying power of sport, it also seeks to increase Turkey's visibility in the international arena. The incoming sponsorship offers demonstrate the project's growth potential on a global scale.

title: Hakan Coşkun's Children's Tribune Project Prepares for the 2026 World Cup
description: Hakan Coşkun, known for the Children's Tribune project that began in 2022, has started comprehensive media preparations to represent Turkey in the United States, Canada, and Mexico at the 2026 World Cup. Within the scope of the project, efforts highlighting the unifying power of sport are being carried out, with the goal of reaching wider audiences at the international event.

title: "CHILDREN'S TRIBUNE" PROJECT IS MOVING TO THE 2026 WORLD CUP
description: Journalist and Kuzeybatı Haber International Media owner Hakan Coşkun has accelerated his 2026 World Cup preparations with his move to America. Coşkun stated that they will leave Turkey's mark on the world stage and expressed that the Children's Tribune project will be represented more powerfully on an international scale. The project aims to create a safe stands environment for children and raise social awareness by highlighting the unifying power of sport.

title: Children's Tribune Project at the World Cup in Qatar
description: The Children's Tribune project, led by businessman Hakan Coşkun and carried out in partnership with SSAUMDER and Kuzeybatı International Media, continues its activities at the Qatar World Cup. The project is drawing international attention by aiming to reduce violence in the stands and create a safer viewing environment for children.

title: Massive Sponsorship Interest for the Children's Tribune Project for the World Cup
description: The Children's Tribune project attracted intense interest from national and international brands within the scope of its 2026 World Cup preparations. While the project aims to reduce violence in the stands and create a safer viewing environment for children, it is reported that numerous global companies from various sectors have submitted sponsorship applications.

title: Businessman Sarıalioğlu Called for Support for the 'Children's Tribune' Project
description: Businessman Fatih Sarıalioğlu stated that the Children's Tribune project, run by the Association for Combating Violence, Alcohol, and Drugs in Sports (SSAUMDER), deserves support. The project aims to create a safer and violence-free stands environment for children at sports competitions.

title: "Children's Tribune" Project Moving to the 2026 World Cup: Hakan Coşkun's American Venture
description: Journalist and Kuzeybatı Haber International Media owner Hakan Coşkun, who attracted international public attention with the "Children's Tribune" project launched at the 2022 Qatar World Cup, has begun preparations for the 2026 World Cup. Coşkun is preparing to represent Turkey at the event to be held in the United States, Canada, and Mexico together with a strong technical team and leading figures from social media. Within the scope of the project, the goal is to spread a child-focused stands culture on an international scale.

title: Children's Tribune at the World Cup
description: Hakan Coşkun, who drew attention with the 'Children's Tribune' project at the 2022 Qatar World Cup, will represent Turkey with a strong media team at the 2026 World Cup. The project aims to spread a child-focused stands culture in the international arena and make Turkey's sports vision visible on a global scale.

title: Massive Sponsorship Interest for the Children's Tribune Project for the World Cup
description: The Children's Tribune project is receiving great interest in sponsorship applications for the 2026 FIFA World Cup. Turkey aims to take its place in the international arena with the project. The 'Children's Tribune' project, which aims to eliminate violence and negativity in the stands using the unifying power of sport, is rapidly continuing its preparations for the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

description: The Children's Tribune project, carried out in partnership with SSAUMDER and Kuzeybatı International Media under the leadership of businessman Hakan Coşkun, continues to grow internationally. The project aims to spread a child-focused stands culture at World Cup events.

description: The 'Children's Tribune' project, carried out in partnership with SSAUMDER and Kuzeybatı International Media and coordinated by businessman Hakan Coşkun, continues its activities at the Qatar World Cup.
